confirmed_behavior.expected: The cart Total should equal the sum of item subtotals and update to $25.00 when quantity is 2.
confirmed_behavior.observed: Changing the cart quantity to 2 updates the item subtotal to $25.00 but the cart Total remains $12.50.

reproduction_steps: Open the Demo Shop home page.
Click 'Add to cart' on 'Blue Shockproof Phone Case'.
In the Cart, change Quantity from 1 to 2.
Observe that the item shows 'Subtotal $25.00' while the cart Total remains '$12.50'.
title: Cart Total not updated after quantity change (shows $12.50 instead of $25.00)
